---
title: "System Performance Glossary"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(flextable)
library(stringr)
```

```{r table, message=F, warning=F}
# Version Updated 4/7/2026
gloss <- readxl::read_xlsx(path = gsub('sandbox', 'public-resources/system performance glossary.xlsx', getwd()))

gloss$`Target Filters/Panels` <- str_wrap(gloss$`Target Filters/Panels`, width = 20)
gloss$Definition <- str_squish(gloss$Definition)
gloss$Definition <- str_wrap(gloss$Definition, width = 80)
gloss$Term <- str_wrap(gloss$Term, width = 20)

flextable(gloss) |>
  autofit() |>
  border_inner() |>
  border_outer() |>
  fit_to_width(max_width = 7.5)
```
